QuantmLayer derives and applies all of these restrictions automatically, from the agent's observed behavior, on the real host filesystem with no separate image.

sentences.en: A default container blocks the two filesystem attacks (separate container filesystem) but is exposed to the fork bomb, cross-process ptrace, and metadata SSRF — each of which needs a flag the operator must know to add (--pids-limit, a tightened seccomp profile, --network none).
sentences.zh: 默认容器会阻止两种文件系统攻击（单独的容器文件系统），但会受到 fork 炸弹、跨进程 ptrace 和元数据 SSRF 的影响，其中每一个都需要操作员必须知道添加的标志（--pids-limit、严格的 seccomp 配置文件、--network none）。

sentences.en: The last row is the sharpest: content-addressed execution has no container flag to add.
sentences.zh: 最后一行是最尖锐的：内容寻址执行没有要添加的容器标志。

sentences.en: A default container runs any binary it ships; QuantmLayer hashes every binary at execve and admits only those on the learned allow-list, so a tool the agent never used — a freshly dropped payload, a curl pulled in by a prompt injection — cannot start, denied by the kernel on content.
sentences.zh: 默认容器运行它附带的任何二进制文件； QuantmLayer 在 execve 处对每个二进制文件进行哈希处理，并只允许那些在学习的允许列表中的二进制文件，因此代理从未使用过的工具（新投放的有效负载、通过提示注入拉入的卷曲）无法启动，被内核在内容上拒绝。

sentences.en: QuantmLayer derives and applies all of these restrictions automatically, from the agent's observed behavior, on the real host filesystem with no separate image.
sentences.zh: QuantmLayer 根据代理观察到的行为，在没有单独映像的真实主机文件系统上自动派生并应用所有这些限制。

blocks.html_en: The exec row needs more than the others to reproduce: a kernel with BPF-LSM + IMA (check with scripts/ql-kernel-probe.sh), an lsm-feature build, and root to load the BPF program — cargo build --release -p ql-bench --features lsm && sudo ./target/release/ql-bench. A default (toolchain-free) make benchmark runs the other five rows and honestly reports the exec row's QuantmLayer cell as unsupported rather than a fake block.

sentences.en: The exec row needs more than the others to reproduce: a kernel with BPF-LSM + IMA (check with scripts/ql-kernel-probe.sh), an lsm-feature build, and root to load the BPF program — cargo build --release -p ql-bench --features lsm && sudo ./target/release/ql-bench.
sentences.zh: exec 行比其他行需要更多的内容来重现：一个带有 BPF-LSM + IMA 的内核（使用 script/ql-kernel-probe.sh 检查）、一个 lsm-feature 构建以及用于加载 BPF 程序的 root — Cargo build --release -p ql-bench --features lsm && sudo ./target/release/ql-bench。

sentences.en: A default (toolchain-free) make benchmark runs the other five rows and honestly reports the exec row's QuantmLayer cell as unsupported rather than a fake block.
sentences.zh: 默认（无工具链）make 基准测试运行其他五行，并诚实地将执行行的 QuantmLayer 单元报告为不受支持，而不是假块。

sentences.en: What it costs
sentences.zh: 费用是多少

blocks.html_en: Containment this thorough is cheap enough to apply per invocation. On our dev VM (root, all walls), full least-privilege adds roughly 0.6 ms per agent run over launching the binary uncontained — the five standard walls (mount, namespace, cgroup, seccomp, network) are effectively free. The content-addressed exec wall is the one cost driver: loading and attaching its BPF-LSM program adds about 15 ms per cold cell. Even so, the heaviest configuration — all six walls — cold-starts roughly 9× faster than a fresh docker run (~16 ms vs ~150 ms, container image pre-pulled); without the exec wall a cell starts well over 100× faster than a container.

sentences.en: Containment this thorough is cheap enough to apply per invocation.
sentences.zh: 这种彻底的遏制足够便宜，可以在每次调用时应用。

sentences.en: On our dev VM (root, all walls), full least-privilege adds roughly 0.6 ms per agent run over launching the binary uncontained — the five standard walls (mount, namespace, cgroup, seccomp, network) are effectively free.
sentences.zh: 在我们的开发虚拟机（根、所有墙）上，完整的最低权限比启动不包含的二进制文件的每个代理运行时间增加了大约 0.6 毫秒——五个标准墙（挂载、命名空间、cgroup、seccomp、网络）实际上是免费的。

sentences.en: The content-addressed exec wall is the one cost driver: loading and attaching its BPF-LSM program adds about 15 ms per cold cell.
sentences.zh: 内容寻址执行墙是一个成本驱动因素：加载和附加其 BPF-LSM 程序会增加每个冷单元约 15 毫秒的时间。

sentences.en: Even so, the heaviest configuration — all six walls — cold-starts roughly 9× faster than a fresh docker run (~16 ms vs ~150 ms, container image pre-pulled); without the exec wall a cell starts well over 100× faster than a container.
sentences.zh: 即便如此，最重的配置（所有六面墙）的冷启动速度比新的 docker 运行快大约 9 倍（约 16 毫秒 vs 约 150 毫秒，预拉容器映像）；如果没有执行墙，单元的启动速度比容器快 100 倍以上。

blocks.html_en: These are per-invocation cold-start numbers: every call builds a fresh cell, with no pooling. The exec wall's BPF program is loaded per cell today; a long-lived broker that loads it once and attaches it to each cell's cgroup drives that ~15 ms toward zero — just as docker exec into a long-lived container amortizes a container's startup. The figures are host-specific and generated, never asserted: see benchmark/OVERHEAD.md and reproduce with make overhead (or, for the exec row, an lsm build run as root).

sentences.en: These are per-invocation cold-start numbers: every call builds a fresh cell, with no pooling.
sentences.zh: 这些是每次调用的冷启动数字：每次调用都会构建一个新的单元，没有池化。

sentences.en: The exec wall's BPF program is loaded per cell today; a long-lived broker that loads it once and attaches it to each cell's cgroup drives that ~15 ms toward zero — just as docker exec into a long-lived container amortizes a container's startup.
sentences.zh: 今天，exec wall 的 BPF 程序已按单元加载；一个长期存在的代理加载一次并将其附加到每个单元的 cgroup 会将大约 15 毫秒驱动到零 — 就像 docker exec 到一个长期存在的容器中分摊容器的启动一样。

sentences.en: The figures are host-specific and generated, never asserted: see benchmark/OVERHEAD.md and reproduce with make overhead (or, for the exec row, an lsm build run as root).
sentences.zh: 这些数字是特定于主机的并生成的，从未断言：请参阅 benchmark/OVERHEAD.md 并使用 make 开销进行重现（或者，对于 exec 行，以 root 身份运行 lsm 构建）。

blocks.html_en: How this differs from cloud sandboxes

sentences.en: How this differs from cloud sandboxes
sentences.zh: 这与云沙箱有何不同

blocks.html_en: Cloud sandboxes solve a related problem a different way: they run the agent on a separate remote machine. That gives strong host isolation — your laptop's files, SSH keys, and other secrets are never present on the remote sandbox, so there is nothing there to steal, and a runaway process is contained to a rented machine rather than yours. For running untrusted, AI-generated code, that model is a great fit.

sentences.en: Cloud sandboxes solve a related problem a different way: they run the agent on a separate remote machine.
sentences.zh: 云沙箱以不同的方式解决相关问题：它们在单独的远程计算机上运行代理。

sentences.en: That gives strong host isolation — your laptop's files, SSH keys, and other secrets are never present on the remote sandbox, so there is nothing there to steal, and a runaway process is contained to a rented machine rather than yours.
sentences.zh: 这提供了强大的主机隔离 - 您的笔记本电脑的文件、SSH 密钥和其他机密永远不会出现在远程沙箱上，因此没有任何东西可以窃取，并且失控的进程包含在租用的计算机而不是您的计算机中。

sentences.en: For running untrusted, AI-generated code, that model is a great fit.
sentences.zh: 对于运行不受信任的人工智能生成的代码，该模型非常适合。

blocks.html_en: The trade-offs are the other side of the same coin:

sentences.en: The trade-offs are the other side of the same coin:
sentences.zh: 权衡是同一枚硬币的另一面：

blocks.html_en: • The agent operates on a copy on someone else's infrastructure, not on your real local files — you sync code up and results back, which doesn't fit an agent meant to work directly in your existing repo, toolchain, and environment.

sentences.en: The agent operates on a copy on someone else's infrastructure, not on your real local files — you sync code up and results back, which doesn't fit an agent meant to work directly in your existing repo, toolchain, and environment.
sentences.zh: 该代理在其他人的基础设施上的副本上运行，而不是在您真实的本地文件上运行 - 您同步代码并返回结果，这不适合直接在您现有的存储库、工具链和环境中工作的代理。

blocks.html_en: • You entrust execution and your code to a third-party cloud.

sentences.en: You entrust execution and your code to a third-party cloud.
sentences.zh: 您将执行和代码委托给第三方云。

blocks.html_en: • Isolation stops at the host boundary, not within the sandbox: unless the provider restricts it, an agent inside the sandbox still has broad latitude over that machine's resources and network (including, potentially, the cloud instance-metadata endpoint).

sentences.en: Isolation stops at the host boundary, not within the sandbox: unless the provider restricts it, an agent inside the sandbox still has broad latitude over that machine's resources and network (including, potentially, the cloud instance-metadata endpoint).
sentences.zh: 隔离停止在主机边界，而不是沙箱内：除非提供商对其进行限制，否则沙箱内的代理仍然对该计算机的资源和网络（包括可能的云实例元数据端点）拥有广泛的自由度。

blocks.html_en: QuantmLayer is built for the opposite situation: contain an agent running locally, on your own machine and your real files, with a least-privilege profile learned from its behavior — no remote machine, no code-sync, no third-party trust. The two approaches are complementary; this benchmark scores host-threat containment, which is QuantmLayer's domain, so remote-execution sandboxes are described here rather than scored as a column.

sentences.en: QuantmLayer is built for the opposite situation: contain an agent running locally, on your own machine and your real files, with a least-privilege profile learned from its behavior — no remote machine, no code-sync, no third-party trust.
sentences.zh: QuantmLayer 是针对相反的情况而构建的：包含在您自己的计算机和真实文件上本地运行的代理，并从其行为中学习到最低权限配置文件 - 没有远程计算机，没有代码同步，没有第三方信任。

sentences.en: The two approaches are complementary; this benchmark scores host-threat containment, which is QuantmLayer's domain, so remote-execution sandboxes are described here rather than scored as a column.
sentences.zh: 这两种方法是互补的；该基准测试对主机威胁遏制进行评分，这是 QuantmLayer 的领域，因此此处描述的是远程执行沙箱，而不是作为一列进行评分。

blocks.html_en: How this differs from prompt-injection defenses

sentences.en: How this differs from prompt-injection defenses
sentences.zh: 这与即时注入防御有何不同

blocks.html_en: A separate line of defense — exemplified by Google DeepMind's CaMeL ("Defeating Prompt Injections by Design," extending Simon Willison's Dual-LLM pattern) — keeps a quarantined, untrusted model from taking privileged action by having the orchestration layer hold the boundary: a privileged LLM plans from the trusted query, a quarantined LLM processes untrusted data with no tool access, and a custom interpreter tracks data provenance and enforces capability policies before each tool call. It's a strong, well-regarded design, and it's solving an adjacent problem to ours.

sentences.en: A separate line of defense — exemplified by Google DeepMind's CaMeL ("Defeating Prompt Injections by Design," extending Simon Willison's Dual-LLM pattern) — keeps a quarantined, untrusted model from taking privileged action by having the orchestration layer hold the boundary: a privileged LLM plans from the trusted query, a quarantined LLM processes untrusted data with no tool access, and a custom interpreter tracks data provenance and enforces capability policies before each tool call.
sentences.zh: 一条单独的防线——以 Google DeepMind 的 CaMeL（“通过设计击败提示注入”，扩展了 Simon Willison 的双 LLM 模式）为例——通过让编排层保持边界来防止隔离的、不受信任的模型采取特权操作：来自受信任查询的特权 LLM 计划，隔离的 LLM 在没有工具访问权限的情况下处理不受信任的数据，以及自定义解释器跟踪数据来源并在每次工具调用之前强制执行功能策略。

sentences.en: It's a strong, well-regarded design, and it's solving an adjacent problem to ours.
sentences.zh: 这是一个强大的、广受好评的设计，它正在解决与我们相似的问题。

blocks.html_en: QuantmLayer makes the quarantine boundary a kernel boundary rather than an interpreter boundary. Where CaMeL trusts the surrounding Python interpreter to hold the air gap, QuantmLayer runs the untrusted work in a zero-capability cell that can return text and nothing else — no files, no network, no exec — enforced below userspace by namespaces, seccomp, and BPF-LSM rather than by orchestration discipline. If the interpreter has a bug, that boundary can leak; the kernel boundary does not depend on the interpreter being correct.

sentences.en: QuantmLayer makes the quarantine boundary a kernel boundary rather than an interpreter boundary.
sentences.zh: QuantmLayer 使隔离边界成为内核边界而不是解释器边界。

sentences.en: Where CaMeL trusts the surrounding Python interpreter to hold the air gap, QuantmLayer runs the untrusted work in a zero-capability cell that can return text and nothing else — no files, no network, no exec — enforced below userspace by namespaces, seccomp, and BPF-LSM rather than by orchestration discipline.
sentences.zh: CaMeL 信任周围的 Python 解释器来保持气隙，而 QuantmLayer 在零功能单元中运行不受信任的工作，该单元可以返回文本，但不返回任何其他内容（没有文件、没有网络、没有执行），在用户空间下通过命名空间、seccomp 和 BPF-LSM 而不是通过编排规则强制执行。

sentences.en: If the interpreter has a bug, that boundary can leak; the kernel boundary does not depend on the interpreter being correct.
sentences.zh: 如果解释器有错误，该边界可能会泄漏；内核边界不依赖于解释器是否正确。

blocks.html_en: To be precise about scope: we harden the quarantine half of that model — making the untrusted boundary a kernel boundary. We do not replicate CaMeL's privileged-side contribution, its capability and data-flow provenance tracking through the trusted interpreter. The claim is "we make the quarantine boundary a kernel boundary," not "we are CaMeL, but better."

sentences.en: To be precise about scope: we harden the quarantine half of that model — making the untrusted boundary a kernel boundary.
sentences.zh: 准确地说，范围是：我们强化了该模型的隔离部分——使不受信任的边界成为内核边界。

sentences.en: We do not replicate CaMeL's privileged-side contribution, its capability and data-flow provenance tracking through the trusted interpreter.
sentences.zh: 我们不会通过可信解释器复制 CaMeL 的特权端贡献、其功能和数据流来源跟踪。

sentences.en: The claim is "we make the quarantine boundary a kernel boundary," not "we are CaMeL, but better."
sentences.zh: 他们的主张是“我们使隔离边界成为核心边界”，而不是“我们是 CaMeL，但更好”。

blocks.html_en: Where it fits: OWASP Agentic Top 10 and EU AI Act

sentences.en: Where it fits: OWASP Agentic Top 10 and EU AI Act
sentences.zh: 适合的地方：OWASP Agentic Top 10 和欧盟人工智能法案

blocks.html_en: QuantmLayer is a runtime containment and evidence layer. It governs what an agent is allowed to do on the host — not what the model thinks or says. That scope maps cleanly onto part of the OWASP Agentic Top 10 (2026): the risks that manifest as actions are addressed by a specific wall; the risks that live inside the model's reasoning are explicitly out of scope, and are marked so below rather than papered over. Each "addressed" row points at a wall that is measured in the What it blocks benchmark, not asserted.

sentences.en: QuantmLayer is a runtime containment and evidence layer.
sentences.zh: QuantmLayer 是一个运行时遏制和证据层。

sentences.en: It governs what an agent is allowed to do on the host — not what the model thinks or says.
sentences.zh: 它控制代理可以在主机上执行的操作，而不是模型所想或所说的。

sentences.en: That scope maps cleanly onto part of the OWASP Agentic Top 10 (2026): the risks that manifest as actions are addressed by a specific wall; the risks that live inside the model's reasoning are explicitly out of scope, and are marked so below rather than papered over.
sentences.zh: 该范围清晰地映射到 OWASP Agentic Top 10 (2026) 的一部分：表现为行动的风险由特定的墙解决；模型推理中存在的风险显然超出了范围，并且在下面进行了标记，而不是掩盖。

sentences.en: Each "addressed" row points at a wall that is measured in the What it blocks benchmark, not asserted.
sentences.zh: 每个“已寻址”行都指向一面墙，该墙是在“它阻止的内容”基准中测量的，但未断言。

sentences.en: OWASP Agentic risk
sentences.zh: OWASP 代理风险

sentences.en: QuantmLayer
sentences.zh: 量子层

sentences.en: Tool misuse / unexpected code execution
sentences.zh: 工具误用/意外的代码执行

sentences.en: Addressed
sentences.zh: 已解决

blocks.html_en: Content-addressed execve (exec wall) admits only binaries on the learned allow-list; a dropped payload or injection-pulled tool cannot start.

sentences.en: Content-addressed execve (exec wall) admits only binaries on the learned allow-list; a dropped payload or injection-pulled tool cannot start.
sentences.zh: 内容寻址 execve (exec wall) 仅允许学习允许列表中的二进制文件；掉落的有效负载或注射拉动工具无法启动。

sentences.en: MCP tool-call abuse (out-of-contract / unauthorized state change)
sentences.zh: MCP 工具调用滥用（合同外/未经授权的状态更改）

sentences.en: Addressed
sentences.zh: 已解决

blocks.html_en: The MCP inspection gateway (ql mcp gateway) validates each tools/call against the server's advertised schema and blocks tools gated as state-changing unless allow-listed; denied calls never reach the server, and every decision is auditable.

sentences.en: The MCP inspection gateway (ql mcp gateway) validates each tools/call against the server's advertised schema and blocks tools gated as state-changing unless allow-listed; denied calls never reach the server, and every decision is auditable.
sentences.zh: MCP 检查网关（ql mcp 网关）根据服务器公布的模式验证每个工具/调用，并阻止被门控为状态更改的工具，除非列入允许列表；被拒绝的呼叫永远不会到达服务器，并且每个决定都是可审核的。

sentences.en: Privilege compromise / escalation
sentences.zh: 权限妥协/升级

sentences.en: Addressed
sentences.zh: 已解决

blocks.html_en: Dropped capabilities + seccomp deny-list + user-namespace mapping; the agent holds only the rights its profile grants.

sentences.en: Dropped capabilities + seccomp deny-list + user-namespace mapping; the agent holds only the rights its profile grants.
sentences.zh: 删除功能 + seccomp 拒绝列表 + 用户命名空间映射；代理仅拥有其个人资料授予的权利。

sentences.en: Resource / availability abuse
sentences.zh: 资源/可用性滥用

sentences.en: Addressed
sentences.zh: 已解决

blocks.html_en: cgroups caps (pids/memory/cpu) contain fork bombs and exhaustion.

sentences.en: cgroups caps (pids/memory/cpu) contain fork bombs and exhaustion.
sentences.zh: cgroups 上限（pid/内存/cpu）包含 fork 炸弹和耗尽。

sentences.en: Identity abuse (non-human identity)
sentences.zh: 身份滥用（非人类身份）

sentences.en: Partial
sentences.zh: 部分的

blocks.html_en: Ed25519 agent identity with attenuating delegation (ql-token): authority only ever narrows down the agent tree, kernel-bound to the cell. Vault-issued ephemeral credentials are on the roadmap, not shipped.

sentences.en: Ed25519 agent identity with attenuating delegation (ql-token): authority only ever narrows down the agent tree, kernel-bound to the cell.
sentences.zh: Ed25519 具有衰减委托（ql-token）的代理身份：权限只会缩小代理树的范围，与内核绑定到单元。

sentences.en: Vault-issued ephemeral credentials are on the roadmap, not shipped.
sentences.zh: Vault 颁发的临时凭证已在路线图上，但尚未交付。

sentences.en: Unexpected RCE / privileged data access
sentences.zh: 意外的 RCE/特权数据访问

sentences.en: Addressed
sentences.zh: 已解决

blocks.html_en: mount wall makes out-of-workspace secrets (~/.ssh, cloud creds) invisible; network wall blocks the cloud-metadata SSRF path.

sentences.en: mount wall makes out-of-workspace secrets (~/.ssh, cloud creds) invisible; network wall blocks the cloud-metadata SSRF path.
sentences.zh: mount wall 使工作空间外的秘密（~/.ssh、云信用）不可见；网络墙阻挡了云元数据 SSRF 路径。

sentences.en: Cascading failures / rogue agent action
sentences.zh: 级联故障/流氓代理操作

sentences.en: Partial
sentences.zh: 部分的

blocks.html_en: Kill switch (ql kill) revokes an agent and its whole process tree instantly; per-subtask containment bounds blast radius. Does not prevent an in-profile action from being wrong.

sentences.en: Kill switch (ql kill) revokes an agent and its whole process tree instantly; per-subtask containment bounds blast radius.
sentences.zh: Kill switch（qlkill）立即撤销一个代理及其整个进程树；每个子任务的遏制范围限制了爆炸半径。

sentences.en: Does not prevent an in-profile action from being wrong.
sentences.zh: 不能防止个人资料内的操作出错。

sentences.en: Memory poisoning
sentences.zh: 记忆中毒

sentences.en: Out of scope
sentences.zh: 超出范围

blocks.html_en: A model-context / reasoning risk; QuantmLayer governs actions, not model memory.

sentences.en: A model-context / reasoning risk; QuantmLayer governs actions, not model memory.
sentences.zh: 模型背景/推理风险； QuantmLayer 管理操作，而不是模型内存。

sentences.en: Goal hijacking / intent manipulation
sentences.zh: 目标劫持/意图操纵

sentences.en: Out of scope
sentences.zh: 超出范围

blocks.html_en: Prompt-layer risk. QuantmLayer's value here is downstream: even a fully hijacked agent can only take actions its profile permits — but detecting the hijack itself is not what this layer does.

sentences.en: Prompt-layer risk.
sentences.zh: 提示层风险。

sentences.en: QuantmLayer's value here is downstream: even a fully hijacked agent can only take actions its profile permits — but detecting the hijack itself is not what this layer does.
sentences.zh: QuantmLayer 在这里的价值在于下游：即使是完全被劫持的代理也只能采取其配置文件允许的操作，但检测劫持本身并不是该层的作用。

blocks.html_en: On prompt injection specifically: QuantmLayer does not detect or block prompt injection — that is a model-layer problem. What it does is make injection less consequential: a subverted agent still cannot read a secret the mount wall hid, reach a domain the broker denied, or run a binary the exec wall didn't admit. The containment holds regardless of why the agent tried.

sentences.en: On prompt injection specifically: QuantmLayer does not detect or block prompt injection — that is a model-layer problem.
sentences.zh: 特别是在提示注入方面：QuantmLayer 不会检测或阻止提示注入——这是一个模型层问题。

sentences.en: What it does is make injection less consequential: a subverted agent still cannot read a secret the mount wall hid, reach a domain the broker denied, or run a binary the exec wall didn't admit.
sentences.zh: 它的作用是使注入变得不那么重要：被破坏的代理仍然无法读取挂载墙隐藏的秘密，到达代理拒绝的域，或运行执行墙不承认的二进制文件。

sentences.en: The containment holds regardless of why the agent tried.
sentences.zh: 无论特工为何尝试，收容都会有效。

blocks.html_en: EU AI Act (Article 12 logging). The Act's high-risk-system logging obligations take effect August 2026. QuantmLayer's audit layer is a technical substrate for that record-keeping: every governed action (exec.run/exec.deny, egress decisions, policy changes) is written to a hash-chained, tamper-evident log, each record stamped with the ai_system identity (system_id, model_version) and independently verifiable by a third party with no QuantmLayer dependency (ql audit export ships a stdlib-only verifier). This is a strong technical control that produces the evidence Article 12 is about — not a turnkey or certified compliance product; the legal determination of compliance is the deployer's, made with counsel. Full control-by-control detail is maintained in a separate mapping document.

sentences.en: EU AI Act (Article 12 logging).
sentences.zh: 欧盟人工智能法案（第 12 条记录）。

sentences.en: The Act's high-risk-system logging obligations take effect August 2026.
sentences.zh: 该法案的高风险系统日志记录义务将于 2026 年 8 月生效。

sentences.en: QuantmLayer's audit layer is a technical substrate for that record-keeping: every governed action (exec.run/exec.deny, egress decisions, policy changes) is written to a hash-chained, tamper-evident log, each record stamped with the ai_system identity (system_id, model_version) and independently verifiable by a third party with no QuantmLayer dependency (ql audit export ships a stdlib-only verifier).
sentences.zh: QuantmLayer 的审计层是记录保存的技术基础：每个受管理的操作（exec.run/exec.deny、出口决策、策略更改）都写入散列链式、防篡改日志，每条记录都标有 ai_system 身份（system_id、model_version），并且可由不依赖 QuantmLayer 的第三方独立验证（ql 审计导出提供仅 stdlib 验证器）。

sentences.en: This is a strong technical control that produces the evidence Article 12 is about — not a turnkey or certified compliance product; the legal determination of compliance is the deployer's, made with counsel.
sentences.zh: 这是一种强有力的技术控制，可产生第 12 条所涉及的证据——不是交钥匙产品或经过认证的合规产品；合规性的法律决定是部署者与律师共同做出的。

sentences.en: Full control-by-control detail is maintained in a separate mapping document.
sentences.zh: 完整的逐个控制细节保存在单独的映射文档中。

sentences.en: Agent identity, enforced
sentences.zh: 代理身份，强制执行

blocks.html_en: An agent's identity in QuantmLayer is an Ed25519 keypair — the public key is the identity, and every action or delegation is a signature the holder of the private key produced. On top of that sit attenuating delegation tokens: when a planner agent spawns a coder, and the coder spawns a reviewer, each hands down a token that can only narrow authority, never broaden it. That monotonic-narrowing property is enforced, not conventional — a delegated token that tries to grant a right its parent didn't hold is rejected (attenuation violation).

sentences.en: An agent's identity in QuantmLayer is an Ed25519 keypair — the public key is the identity, and every action or delegation is a signature the holder of the private key produced.
sentences.zh: QuantmLayer 中代理的身份是 Ed25519 密钥对 — 公钥是身份，每个操作或委托都是生成的私钥持有者的签名。

sentences.en: On top of that sit attenuating delegation tokens: when a planner agent spawns a coder, and the coder spawns a reviewer, each hands down a token that can only narrow authority, never broaden it.
sentences.zh: 最重要的是削弱委托令牌：当规划者代理生成编码器时，编码器生成审阅者，每个人都会传递一个令牌，该令牌只能缩小权限，而永远不会扩大权限。

sentences.en: That monotonic-narrowing property is enforced, not conventional — a delegated token that tries to grant a right its parent didn't hold is rejected (attenuation violation).
sentences.zh: 这种单调窄化属性是强制的，而不是传统的——尝试授予其父代未持有的权利的委托代币会被拒绝（衰减违规）。

blocks.html_en: The tokens are bound to the containment cell: a profile can be narrowed by the token that launches it, before the cell is built, so the credential and the enforcement are the same decision. This is non-human identity with zero standing privilege — an agent holds exactly the rights its token carries for exactly the subtask it runs, checked at the kernel boundary rather than trusted by convention. ql token demo walks the full issue → attenuate → reject-broadening path.

sentences.en: The tokens are bound to the containment cell: a profile can be narrowed by the token that launches it, before the cell is built, so the credential and the enforcement are the same decision.
sentences.zh: 令牌绑定到遏制单元：在构建单元之前，可以通过启动配置文件的令牌来缩小配置文件的范围，因此凭证和执行是相同的决定。

sentences.en: This is non-human identity with zero standing privilege — an agent holds exactly the rights its token carries for exactly the subtask it runs, checked at the kernel boundary rather than trusted by convention.
sentences.zh: 这是具有零常设特权的非人类身份——代理完全拥有其令牌所承载的其运行的子任务的权利，在内核边界进行检查，而不是按照约定进行信任。

sentences.en: ql token demo walks the full issue → attenuate → reject-broadening path.
sentences.zh: ql 令牌演示走完整的问题 → 衰减 → 拒绝扩大路径。

blocks.html_en: Scope note: this is the identity and delegation substrate. Integration with enterprise secret vaults (Vault, AWS Secrets Manager, CyberArk) to issue ephemeral, auto-revoked credentials is on the roadmap, not yet shipped.

sentences.en: Scope note: this is the identity and delegation substrate.
sentences.zh: 范围说明：这是身份和委托基础。

sentences.en: Integration with enterprise secret vaults (Vault, AWS Secrets Manager, CyberArk) to issue ephemeral, auto-revoked credentials is on the roadmap, not yet shipped.
sentences.zh: 与企业秘密保管库（Vault、AWS Secrets Manager、Cyber​​Ark）集成以颁发临时、自动撤销的凭证已在路线图上，但尚未发布。

sentences.en: Architecture
sentences.zh: 建筑学

blocks.html_en: The system is a small Cargo workspace of focused crates:

sentences.en: The system is a small Cargo workspace of focused crates:
sentences.zh: 该系统是一个由集中板条箱组成的小型 Cargo 工作区：

blocks.html_en: • ql-profile — the portable, OS-independent policy model (pure data; no OS dependencies). A profile declares filesystem, network, syscall, capability, and resource rules.

sentences.en: ql-profile — the portable, OS-independent policy model (pure data; no OS dependencies).
sentences.zh: ql-profile — 可移植、独立于操作系统的策略模型（纯数据；无操作系统依赖性）。

sentences.en: A profile declares filesystem, network, syscall, capability, and resource rules.
sentences.zh: 配置文件声明文件系统、网络、系统调用、功能和资源规则。

blocks.html_en: • ql-learn — the learning half, and the moat. It traces an agent's real syscalls (openat/open with read/write intent, execve, connect) via ptrace, then synthesizes a least-privilege profile from what the agent actually needed. Enforcement is mechanical; deciding what to enforce is the defensible part. This is the dynamic counterpart to Decap's static capability derivation.

sentences.en: ql-learn — the learning half, and the moat.
sentences.zh: ql-learn——学习的一半，以及护城河。

sentences.en: It traces an agent's real syscalls (openat/open with read/write intent, execve, connect) via ptrace, then synthesizes a least-privilege profile from what the agent actually needed.
sentences.zh: 它通过 ptrace 跟踪代理的真实系统调用（具有读/写意图的 openat/open、execve、connect），然后根据代理实际需要的内容合成最低权限配置文件。

sentences.en: Enforcement is mechanical; deciding what to enforce is the defensible part.
sentences.zh: 强制执行是机械性的；决定执行什么是可辩护的部分。

sentences.en: This is the dynamic counterpart to Decap's static capability derivation.
sentences.zh: 这是 Decap 静态能力推导的动态对应。

blocks.html_en: • ql-enforce — the Linux enforcement engine. Each containment mechanism is an Enforcer (mount, namespaces, cgroups, seccomp, network, and — behind the lsm feature — content-addressed execve), composed into a Cell that forks, applies the walls, and execs the agent. Fail-closed: if a wall can't be applied, the agent doesn't run.

sentences.en: ql-enforce — the Linux enforcement engine.
sentences.zh: ql-enforce — Linux 强制引擎。

sentences.en: Each containment mechanism is an Enforcer (mount, namespaces, cgroups, seccomp, network, and — behind the lsm feature — content-addressed execve), composed into a Cell that forks, applies the walls, and execs the agent.
sentences.zh: 每个遏制机制都是一个 Enforcer（挂载、命名空间、cgroup、seccomp、网络，以及 lsm 功能背后的内容寻址 execve），组成一个用于分叉、应用隔离墙并执行代理的 Cell。

sentences.en: Fail-closed: if a wall can't be applied, the agent doesn't run.
sentences.zh: 失败关闭：如果无法应用墙，则代理不会运行。

blocks.html_en: • ql-lsm — the content-addressed exec wall: a sleepable BPF-LSM program that hashes each binary at execve (via the kernel's IMA) and permits only the digests on the profile's allow-list, so a binary the agent never ran is denied by content, not by name. Beyond that allow/deny, it enforces per-binary argv-deny rules: for an approved binary, a specific denied argument (say, a destructive flag) is matched against the committed argv and the offending process is killed by the kernel (bpf_send_signal). This is a post-commit detect-and-kill, deliberately distinct from the pre-execution digest allow/deny — the sound, tamper-free argv is only readable once the new image is installed, so the wall kills the invocation at that point rather than claiming to prevent it beforehand. Built behind ql-enforce's lsm feature and excluded from the default workspace because it needs a BPF/clang toolchain to compile — every other crate builds with no special tooling.

sentences.en: ql-lsm — the content-addressed exec wall: a sleepable BPF-LSM program that hashes each binary at execve (via the kernel's IMA) and permits only the digests on the profile's allow-list, so a binary the agent never ran is denied by content, not by name.
sentences.zh: ql-lsm — 内容寻址的 exec wall：一个可休眠的 BPF-LSM 程序，它在 execve 上对每个二进制文件进行哈希处理（通过内核的 IMA），并仅允许配置文件允许列表上的摘要，因此代理从未运行的二进制文件会被内容拒绝，而不是名称拒绝。

sentences.en: Beyond that allow/deny, it enforces per-binary argv-deny rules: for an approved binary, a specific denied argument (say, a destructive flag) is matched against the committed argv and the offending process is killed by the kernel (bpf_send_signal).
sentences.zh: 除了允许/拒绝之外，它还强制执行每个二进制文件的 argv 拒绝规则：对于批准的二进制文件，特定的拒绝参数（例如破坏性标志）与提交的 argv 相匹配，并且有问题的进程被内核杀死（bpf_send_signal）。

sentences.en: This is a post-commit detect-and-kill, deliberately distinct from the pre-execution digest allow/deny — the sound, tamper-free argv is only readable once the new image is installed, so the wall kills the invocation at that point rather than claiming to prevent it beforehand.
sentences.zh: 这是一个提交后检测和终止，故意与执行前摘要允许/拒绝不同——只有在安装新映像后，声音、防篡改的 argv 才可读，因此墙会在此时终止调用，而不是声称事先阻止它。

sentences.en: Built behind ql-enforce's lsm feature and excluded from the default workspace because it needs a BPF/clang toolchain to compile — every other crate builds with no special tooling.
sentences.zh: 在 ql-enforce 的 lsm 功能后面构建，并从默认工作区中排除，因为它需要 BPF/clang 工具链来编译 - 所有其他 crate 都无需特殊工具即可构建。

blocks.html_en: • ql-broker — an egress broker (HTTP CONNECT proxy) that enforces the profile's domain allow-list and refuses private/link-local addresses. Optionally token-gated: with --trust, egress requires a valid signed delegation token (ql-token) whose capability permits the destination, and every decision is written to a tamper-evident audit log (ql-audit). Pure userspace, not Linux-specific.

sentences.en: ql-broker — an egress broker (HTTP CONNECT proxy) that enforces the profile's domain allow-list and refuses private/link-local addresses.
sentences.zh: ql-broker — 一个出口代理（HTTP CONNECT 代理），它强制执行配置文件的域白名单并拒绝私有/链接本地地址。

sentences.en: Optionally token-gated: with --trust, egress requires a valid signed delegation token (ql-token) whose capability permits the destination, and every decision is written to a tamper-evident audit log (ql-audit).
sentences.zh: 可选的令牌门控：使用 --trust，出口需要一个有效的签名委托令牌 (ql-token)，其能力允许目的地，并且每个决策都写入防篡改审计日志 (ql-audit)。

sentences.en: Pure userspace, not Linux-specific.
sentences.zh: 纯用户空间，不是 Linux 特定的。

blocks.html_en: • ql-bench — the benchmark harness ("credibility engine") that runs the attack catalog against each backend and emits the scorecard above.

sentences.en: ql-bench — the benchmark harness ("credibility engine") that runs the attack catalog against each backend and emits the scorecard above.
sentences.zh: ql-bench — 基准测试工具（“可信度引擎”），针对每个后端运行攻击目录并发出上面的记分卡。

blocks.html_en: • ql-cli — the ql command-line front door over all of the above.

sentences.en: ql-cli — the ql command-line front door over all of the above.
sentences.zh: ql-cli — 上述所有内容的 ql 命令行前门。

blocks.html_en: The split is deliberate: ql-profile is the portable contract, ql-enforce is where all OS-specific code lives, and ql-broker is OS-portable. A future macOS (Seatbelt) or Windows (AppContainer/Job Objects) backend would implement the same Enforcer contract against the same profiles.

sentences.en: The split is deliberate: ql-profile is the portable contract, ql-enforce is where all OS-specific code lives, and ql-broker is OS-portable.
sentences.zh: 这种划分是经过深思熟虑的：ql-profile 是可移植的合约，ql-enforce 是所有特定于操作系统的代码所在的位置，而 ql-broker 是可移植的操作系统。

sentences.en: A future macOS (Seatbelt) or Windows (AppContainer/Job Objects) backend would implement the same Enforcer contract against the same profiles.
sentences.zh: 未来的 macOS（安全带）或 Windows（AppContainer/作业对象）后端将针对相同的配置文件实施相同的 Enforcer 合约。

sentences.en: Platform support
sentences.zh: 平台支持

blocks.html_en: The kernel containment layer targets Linux and works on every current enterprise kernel (RHEL 8/9, all current Ubuntu LTS, Amazon Linux) — namespaces, mount isolation, classic seccomp-bpf, and cgroups (both v1 and v2 are supported). Where a host lacks a specific control, that wall degrades to a clearly-reported "unsupported" rather than failing the whole cell. The content-addressed exec wall is the one with stricter requirements: it needs a kernel built with BPF-LSM and IMA (Linux ≥ 5.7 with bpf in the active LSM list) and is compiled only in an lsm-feature build; where either is missing, exec enforcement reports "unsupported" like any other wall while the rest of the cell holds. The broker is pure userspace and runs anywhere. Brokered egress (ql run --broker) additionally uses iproute2 (the ubiquitous ip tool) to wire the veth uplink.

sentences.en: The kernel containment layer targets Linux and works on every current enterprise kernel (RHEL 8/9, all current Ubuntu LTS, Amazon Linux) — namespaces, mount isolation, classic seccomp-bpf, and cgroups (both v1 and v2 are supported).
sentences.zh: 内核包含层以 Linux 为目标，适用于当前的每个企业内核（RHEL 8/9、所有当前的 Ubuntu LTS、Amazon Linux）——命名空间、挂载隔离、经典 seccomp-bpf 和 cgroup（支持 v1 和 v2）。

sentences.en: Where a host lacks a specific control, that wall degrades to a clearly-reported "unsupported" rather than failing the whole cell.
sentences.zh: 如果宿主缺乏特定的控制，该壁就会退化为明确报告的“不受支持”，而不是使整个细胞失效。

sentences.en: The content-addressed exec wall is the one with stricter requirements: it needs a kernel built with BPF-LSM and IMA (Linux ≥ 5.7 with bpf in the active LSM list) and is compiled only in an lsm-feature build; where either is missing, exec enforcement reports "unsupported" like any other wall while the rest of the cell holds.
sentences.zh: 内容寻址的 exec wall 具有更严格的要求：它需要一个使用 BPF-LSM 和 IMA 构建的内核（Linux ≥ 5.7，且 bpf 在活动 LSM 列表中），并且仅在 lsm-feature 版本中进行编译；如果其中任何一个缺失，执行执行会像任何其他墙一样报告“不受支持”，而单元格的其余部分则保持不变。

sentences.en: The broker is pure userspace and runs anywhere.
sentences.zh: 代理是纯用户空间，可以在任何地方运行。

sentences.en: Brokered egress (ql run --broker) additionally uses iproute2 (the ubiquitous ip tool) to wire the veth uplink.
sentences.zh: Brokered egress (ql run --broker) 另外使用 iproute2（无处不在的 ip 工具）来连接 veth 上行链路。

blocks.html_en: Validated on managed-cloud node images. The strict-requirement question — "does my cloud node actually have BPF-LSM + IMA?" — is answered by measurement, not assumption. On Amazon Linux 2023, the default Amazon EKS node OS (kernel 6.18), a real ql run enforces the Tier-1 BPF-LSM exec wall with no node reconfiguration: bpf is already in the active LSM list, and content-addressed deny-by-default works with the stock IMA setup — no custom AMI and no IMA policy needed (verified live: an approved binary runs, an unapproved one is denied at execve). Google Container-Optimized OS, the default GKE node OS (kernel 6.6), ships BPF-LSM active the same way and is Tier-1-capable. Run ql doctor on any node to see the tier it resolves, or scripts/ql-kernel-probe.sh for the full read-only kernel-capability report.

sentences.en: Validated on managed-cloud node images.
sentences.zh: 在托管云节点映像上进行了验证。

sentences.en: The strict-requirement question — "does my cloud node actually have BPF-LSM + IMA?" — is answered by measurement, not assumption.
sentences.zh: 严格要求问题——“我的云节点真的有 BPF-LSM + IMA 吗？” ——通过测量而不是假设来回答。

sentences.en: On Amazon Linux 2023, the default Amazon EKS node OS (kernel 6.18), a real ql run enforces the Tier-1 BPF-LSM exec wall with no node reconfiguration: bpf is already in the active LSM list, and content-addressed deny-by-default works with the stock IMA setup — no custom AMI and no IMA policy needed (verified live: an approved binary runs, an unapproved one is denied at execve).
sentences.zh: 在 Amazon Linux 2023（默认 Amazon EKS 节点操作系统）（内核 6.18）上，真正的 ql 运行会强制执行第 1 层 BPF-LSM exec wall，无需重新配置节点：bpf 已位于活动 LSM 列表中，并且内容寻址默认拒绝与库存 IMA 设置配合使用 — 无需自定义 AMI，也无需 IMA 策略（已验证：已批准的二进制文件运行，未经批准的二进制文件在执行时被拒绝）。

sentences.en: Google Container-Optimized OS, the default GKE node OS (kernel 6.6), ships BPF-LSM active the same way and is Tier-1-capable.
sentences.zh: Google Container-Optimized OS 是默认的 GKE 节点操作系统（内核 6.6），以相同的方式提供 BPF-LSM，并且具有 Tier-1 功能。

sentences.en: Run ql doctor on any node to see the tier it resolves, or scripts/ql-kernel-probe.sh for the full read-only kernel-capability report.
sentences.zh: 在任何节点上运行 ql doctor 以查看其解析的层，或运行 script/ql-kernel-probe.sh 以获取完整的只读内核功能报告。

blocks.html_en: Both x86-64 and aarch64 (ARM64) are supported, including profile learning: syscall numbers are resolved per-architecture and the tracer reads registers via the architecture's native ptrace interface, so ql learn works on Apple Silicon VMs and AWS Graviton as well as on x86-64 hosts.

sentences.en: Both x86-64 and aarch64 (ARM64) are supported, including profile learning: syscall numbers are resolved per-architecture and the tracer reads registers via the architecture's native ptrace interface, so ql learn works on Apple Silicon VMs and AWS Graviton as well as on x86-64 hosts.
sentences.zh: 支持 x86-64 和 aarch64 (ARM64)，包括配置文件学习：系统调用号按架构解析，跟踪器通过架构的本机 ptrace 接口读取寄存器，因此 ql learn 适用于 Apple Silicon VM 和 AWS Graviton 以及 x86-64 主机。

sentences.en: Deployment & posture
sentences.zh: 部署和姿势

blocks.html_en: The cell builds itself out of unprivileged user namespaces, so it needs the capability to use a user namespace. On hardened kernels — Ubuntu 24.04, and 22.04 running the 6.8+ HWE kernel — AppArmor restricts that by default: a program may create a user namespace but is denied capabilities inside it. When that bites, ql run does the right thing and refuses to run the agent uncontained, reporting exactly which wall failed rather than silently running with a hole in the cage.

sentences.en: The cell builds itself out of unprivileged user namespaces, so it needs the capability to use a user namespace.
sentences.zh: 该单元是在非特权用户命名空间的基础上构建自身的，因此它需要能够使用用户命名空间。

sentences.en: On hardened kernels — Ubuntu 24.04, and 22.04 running the 6.8+ HWE kernel — AppArmor restricts that by default: a program may create a user namespace but is denied capabilities inside it.
sentences.zh: 在强化内核（运行 6.8+ HWE 内核的 Ubuntu 24.04 和 22.04）上，AppArmor 默认情况下会限制这一点：程序可以创建用户命名空间，但无法使用其中的功能。

sentences.en: When that bites, ql run does the right thing and refuses to run the agent uncontained, reporting exactly which wall failed rather than silently running with a hole in the cage.
sentences.zh: 当这种情况发生时，ql run 会做正确的事情，拒绝在不受控制的情况下运行代理，准确报告哪堵墙发生了故障，而不是默默地在笼子上开个洞运行。

sentences.en: There are three supported postures:
sentences.zh: 支持的姿势有以下三种：

blocks.html_en: • Rootless + AppArmor profile (recommended). Install the binary and the bundled profile (sudo make install && sudo make install-apparmor). ql is then granted userns while every other program on the host stays protected — nothing is weakened system-wide. This is the same mechanism Ubuntu ships for Chrome and flatpak. Requires AppArmor 4.x userspace.

sentences.en: Rootless + AppArmor profile (recommended).
sentences.zh: Rootless + AppArmor 配置文件（推荐）。

sentences.en: Install the binary and the bundled profile (sudo make install && sudo make install-apparmor).
sentences.zh: 安装二进制文件和捆绑的配置文件（sudo make install && sudo make install-apparmor）。

sentences.en: ql is then granted userns while every other program on the host stays protected — nothing is weakened system-wide.
sentences.zh: 然后，ql 被授予 userns，而主机上的所有其他程序都保持受保护 — 系统范围内没有任何内容被削弱。

sentences.en: This is the same mechanism Ubuntu ships for Chrome and flatpak.
sentences.zh: 这与 Ubuntu 为 Chrome 和 Flatpak 提供的机制相同。

sentences.en: Requires AppArmor 4.x userspace.
sentences.zh: 需要 AppArmor 4.x 用户空间。

blocks.html_en: • Rootless + lifted restriction (quick, for dev). echo 0 | sudo tee /proc/sys/kernel/apparmor_restrict_unprivileged_userns. Fast, but it relaxes the protection for every program on the host, so it isn't appropriate for shared or production machines.

sentences.en: Rootless + lifted restriction (quick, for dev).
sentences.zh: 无根+解除限制（快速，对于开发人员）。

sentences.en: echo 0 | sudo tee /proc/sys/kernel/apparmor_restrict_unprivileged_userns.
sentences.zh: 回声 0 | sudo tee /proc/sys/kernel/apparmor_restrict_unprivileged_userns。

sentences.en: Fast, but it relaxes the protection for every program on the host, so it isn't appropriate for shared or production machines.
sentences.zh: 速度快，但它放松了对主机上每个程序的保护，因此它不适合共享或生产计算机。

blocks.html_en: Which walls are active in each posture:

sentences.en: Which walls are active in each posture:

sentences.en: Rootless (+profile or lifted)

sentences.en: Filesystem hiding (mount)
sentences.zh: 文件系统隐藏（挂载）

sentences.en: Syscall denial (seccomp)
sentences.zh: 系统调用拒绝 (seccomp)

sentences.en: ✅ with a BPF-LSM/IMA kernel

blocks.html_en: The cgroup wall is the one exception to rootless parity: writing cgroup limits needs either root or a delegated cgroup subtree (e.g. a systemd user slice with Delegate=yes). Without it, that wall degrades to a clearly-printed "unavailable" warning and the cell continues — so on a stock rootless host the file/syscall/network containment is fully in force, but the fork-bomb / memory limits are not. Run under root (or set up delegation) when resource limits matter. The exec wall is gated similarly: loading its BPF-LSM program needs root and a BPF-LSM/IMA kernel, and it is compiled only in an lsm-feature build — so it is inactive in the default rootless posture and active when you run a --features lsm build as root.

sentences.en: The cgroup wall is the one exception to rootless parity: writing cgroup limits needs either root or a delegated cgroup subtree (e.g. a systemd user slice with Delegate=yes).

Exit code 3 is the "policy finding" code (--strict would-deny, audit tamper), distinct from 1 (couldn't run) and 2 (usage), so pipelines can gate without scraping stderr. Full contract: docs/MACHINE-INTERFACE.md.

content_html_zh:
对 AI 编码代理的内核强制遏制。 quantmlayer.com · 快速入门 · 演示 · 安全

编码代理的安全运行时。 我们不保证特工说什么——我们保证特工被允许做什么。

自主编码代理以您的 shell 权限运行：它可以读取 ~/.ssh/id_rsa、窃取机密、耗尽主机、跟踪其他进程，或者访问云元数据端点以窃取云凭据。 QuantmLayer 将代理包装在由可移植的声明性配置文件构建的内核强制遏制单元中，因此受到损害或提示注入的代理无法访问任何未明确授予的内容。

▶ 37 秒内查看：demo/ 运行整个循环 — 通过观察编码代理来学习最低权限配置文件，然后观察相同的配置文件阻止代理从未执行过的 SSH 密钥盗窃行为。

快速入门

# Install the static binary (x86_64 or aarch64, auto-detected; no runtime
# deps) + AppArmor profile:
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/quantmlayer/quantmlayer/main/scripts/install.sh | sh
# ...or build from source:
cargo build --release

# ONE COMMAND — contain a known coding agent with a curated profile that is
# embedded in the `ql` binary (nothing to install or point at). The current
# directory becomes the workspace; SSH/AWS/GPG/kube/gcloud credentials are
# invisible; network egress is allow-listed to the agent's own endpoints
# plus package registries. Bundled: claude, codex, gemini, aider, cline,
# cursor, opencode, openhands.
ql agent claude
ql agent codex --broker --audit run.jsonl   # brokered egress + audit trail
ql agent list                                # what's bundled
ql validate --agent claude                   # inspect a bundled profile

# MCP SERVERS — an MCP server is third-party code your MCP client runs with
# YOUR shell's privileges. One command rewrites a client config (Claude
# Desktop, Claude Code .mcp.json, Cursor, ...) so every stdio server it
# launches runs inside a containment cell. Transparent to the protocol:
# the JSON-RPC stream over stdin/stdout passes through the cell untouched.
# The default MCP profile hides credentials and FAILS CLOSED on network
# egress — grant a network-backed server its domains via a per-config
# profile override, derived with `ql learn` rather than guessed.
ql mcp wrap ~/.config/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json --in-place
ql mcp wrap .mcp.json --in-place --broker --audit mcp.jsonl
ql mcp list .mcp.json                        # who is contained, who is not
ql mcp unwrap .mcp.json --in-place           # reverse the rewrite

# INSPECTION GATEWAY — beyond containing the server process, inspect the
# JSON-RPC stream itself. `ql mcp gateway` is a stdio proxy that validates
# each tools/call against the server's advertised schema (rejecting unknown
# tools, missing required args, wrong types) and blocks tools gated as
# state-changing unless allow-listed. Denied calls never reach the server;
# every decision (allow + deny) can be written to a hash-chained audit log.
ql mcp gateway --gate delete_file --audit gw.jsonl -- <server cmd>
# Compose both layers in one wrap: server runs INSIDE the cell AND behind
# the gateway (ql run --mcp -- ql mcp gateway ... -- <server>):
ql mcp wrap .mcp.json --in-place --gateway --gate delete_file

# THE MOAT — learn a least-privilege profile by observing an agent, then
# enforce it. The generated profile reruns the agent fine but denies everything
# it never needed (SSH keys, ptrace, network, binaries it never ran, ...):
ql learn --out agent.yaml -- ./my-agent build
ql run   --profile agent.yaml -- ./my-agent build

# ON-RAMP — dry-run without enforcing. `--observe` traces the agent and
# reports what enforce mode WOULD have denied, writing a would-deny report to
# a NOT-ENFORCING audit log, so you can see a profile is right before it
# blocks real work. `--strict` exits non-zero on any would-deny (a CI gate):
ql run --observe --agent claude -- claude
ql run --observe --strict --profile agent.yaml -- ./my-agent build

# Run a coding agent inside a containment cell:
ql run --profile profiles/coding.yaml -- my-agent --task "fix the failing test"

# Same, but with brokered egress: the agent's ONLY network route is the
# broker, which allows the profile's domains (e.g. pypi.org) and refuses
# everything else, including the cloud-metadata endpoint:
ql run --broker --profile profiles/coding.yaml -- my-agent --task "..."

# Preflight: which containment walls does THIS host actually give you, and which
# exec-enforcement tier (kernel BPF-LSM vs userspace seccomp-notify)? Read-only —
# reads /proc and /sys, loads nothing. Add --json for a machine-readable matrix:
ql doctor

# Inspect what a profile will enforce:
ql validate --profile profiles/coding.yaml

# Export the learned policy to a portable format other runtimes consume — an
# OCI/Docker seccomp profile, or a `docker run` invocation. Each export is
# explicit about what the target can and can't enforce (the gaps are where
# local containment still matters):
ql export --profile agent.yaml --format seccomp --out ql-seccomp.json
ql export --profile agent.yaml --format docker  --out run.sh

# Tamper-evident audit log: append hash-chained records of what the agent
# attempted (e.g. egress decisions), then verify the chain. Anyone you hand the
# log to can verify it wasn't altered — they don't have to trust the producer:
ql audit append run.log --actor broker --action egress.connect \
  --target 169.254.169.254:80 --decision deny --detail "cloud metadata blocked"
ql audit verify run.log

# Kill switch: list running cells, then revoke one instantly and completely —
# the agent and every process it spawned — recording the revocation in the log:
ql ps
ql kill <id> --audit run.log

# Agent identity + delegation tokens: authority that only narrows down the
# agent tree (Ed25519). The demo issues a grant, attenuates it to a sub-agent,
# and shows a broadening attempt rejected:
ql token demo

# Run the egress broker on its own (allow-listed network access):
ql broker --profile profiles/coding.yaml --listen 127.0.0.1:8080

ql run 是透明的：命令的输出通过并且 ql 使用命令自己的退出代码退出。

不在 Linux 上吗？ ql 的墙是 Linux 内核原语，因此 Windows 和 macOS 在它们已有的 Linux 环境中运行真正的单元 - Windows 上的 WSL2，macOS 上的轻量级 Linux VM。 全墙保真度； ql doctor 会报告您获得的确切级别。 请参阅 docs/PLATFORMS.md。

它阻止了什么

下面的每一行都是通过可重复的基准（make benchmark）来测量的——从未断言。 Docker 是安装了工作区的默认 docker 运行（无强化标志）；每次攻击的确切场景和目标墙都记录在 benchmark/ 下，并且每次运行时实时记分卡都会重新生成到 benchmark/RESULTS.md 中。

攻击 Wall 无遏制 码头工人 量子层
SSH 私钥盗窃 mount 易受伤害的 被阻止 被阻止
读取工作空间外的秘密 mount 易受伤害的 被阻止 被阻止
资源耗尽（叉子炸弹） cgroups 易受伤害的 易受伤害的 被阻止
跨进程内存读取/ptrace 安全计算 易受伤害的 易受伤害的 被阻止
云元数据 SSRF 网络 易受伤害的 易受伤害的 被阻止
运行未经授权的工具（内容寻址执行程序） exec 易受伤害的 易受伤害的 被阻止

默认容器会阻止两种文件系统攻击（单独的容器文件系统），但会受到 fork 炸弹、跨进程 ptrace 和元数据 SSRF 的影响，其中每一个都需要操作员必须知道添加的标志（--pids-limit、严格的 seccomp 配置文件、--network none）。 最后一行是最尖锐的：内容寻址执行没有要添加的容器标志。 默认容器运行它附带的任何二进制文件； QuantmLayer 在 execve 处对每个二进制文件进行哈希处理，并只允许那些在学习的允许列表中的二进制文件，因此代理从未使用过的工具（新投放的有效负载、通过提示注入拉入的卷曲）无法启动，被内核在内容上拒绝。 QuantmLayer 根据代理观察到的行为，在没有单独映像的真实主机文件系统上自动派生并应用所有这些限制。

exec 行比其他行需要更多的内容来重现：一个带有 BPF-LSM + IMA 的内核（使用 script/ql-kernel-probe.sh 检查）、一个 lsm-feature 构建以及用于加载 BPF 程序的 root — Cargo build --release -p ql-bench --features lsm && sudo ./target/release/ql-bench。 默认（无工具链）make 基准测试运行其他五行，并诚实地将执行行的 QuantmLayer 单元报告为不受支持，而不是假块。

费用是多少

这种彻底的遏制足够便宜，可以在每次调用时应用。 在我们的开发虚拟机（根、所有墙）上，完整的最低权限比启动不包含的二进制文件的每个代理运行时间增加了大约 0.6 毫秒——五个标准墙（挂载、命名空间、cgroup、seccomp、网络）实际上是免费的。 内容寻址执行墙是一个成本驱动因素：加载和附加其 BPF-LSM 程序会增加每个冷单元约 15 毫秒的时间。 即便如此，最重的配置（所有六面墙）的冷启动速度比新的 docker 运行快大约 9 倍（约 16 毫秒 vs 约 150 毫秒，预拉容器映像）；如果没有执行墙，单元的启动速度比容器快 100 倍以上。

这些是每次调用的冷启动数字：每次调用都会构建一个新的单元，没有池化。 今天，exec wall 的 BPF 程序已按单元加载；一个长期存在的代理加载一次并将其附加到每个单元的 cgroup 会将大约 15 毫秒驱动到零 — 就像 docker exec 到一个长期存在的容器中分摊容器的启动一样。 这些数字是特定于主机的并生成的，从未断言：请参阅 benchmark/OVERHEAD.md 并使用 make 开销进行重现（或者，对于 exec 行，以 root 身份运行 lsm 构建）。

这与云沙箱有何不同

云沙箱以不同的方式解决相关问题：它们在单独的远程计算机上运行代理。 这提供了强大的主机隔离 - 您的笔记本电脑的文件、SSH 密钥和其他机密永远不会出现在远程沙箱上，因此没有任何东西可以窃取，并且失控的进程包含在租用的计算机而不是您的计算机中。 对于运行不受信任的人工智能生成的代码，该模型非常适合。

权衡是同一枚硬币的另一面：

  • 该代理在其他人的基础设施上的副本上运行，而不是在您真实的本地文件上运行 - 您同步代码并返回结果，这不适合直接在您现有的存储库、工具链和环境中工作的代理。
  • 您将执行和代码委托给第三方云。
  • 隔离停止在主机边界，而不是沙箱内：除非提供商对其进行限制，否则沙箱内的代理仍然对该计算机的资源和网络（包括可能的云实例元数据端点）拥有广泛的自由度。

QuantmLayer 是针对相反的情况而构建的：包含在您自己的计算机和真实文件上本地运行的代理，并从其行为中学习到最低权限配置文件 - 没有远程计算机，没有代码同步，没有第三方信任。 这两种方法是互补的；该基准测试对主机威胁遏制进行评分，这是 QuantmLayer 的领域，因此此处描述的是远程执行沙箱，而不是作为一列进行评分。

这与即时注入防御有何不同

一条单独的防线——以 Google DeepMind 的 CaMeL（“通过设计击败提示注入”，扩展了 Simon Willison 的双 LLM 模式）为例——通过让编排层保持边界来防止隔离的、不受信任的模型采取特权操作：来自受信任查询的特权 LLM 计划，隔离的 LLM 在没有工具访问权限的情况下处理不受信任的数据，以及自定义解释器跟踪数据来源并在每次工具调用之前强制执行功能策略。 这是一个强大的、广受好评的设计，它正在解决与我们相似的问题。

QuantmLayer 使隔离边界成为内核边界而不是解释器边界。 CaMeL 信任周围的 Python 解释器来保持气隙，而 QuantmLayer 在零功能单元中运行不受信任的工作，该单元可以返回文本，但不返回任何其他内容（没有文件、没有网络、没有执行），在用户空间下通过命名空间、seccomp 和 BPF-LSM 而不是通过编排规则强制执行。 如果解释器有错误，该边界可能会泄漏；内核边界不依赖于解释器是否正确。

准确地说，范围是：我们强化了该模型的隔离部分——使不受信任的边界成为内核边界。 我们不会通过可信解释器复制 CaMeL 的特权端贡献、其功能和数据流来源跟踪。 他们的主张是“我们使隔离边界成为核心边界”，而不是“我们是 CaMeL，但更好”。

适合的地方：OWASP Agentic Top 10 和欧盟人工智能法案

QuantmLayer 是一个运行时遏制和证据层。 它控制代理可以在主机上执行的操作，而不是模型所想或所说的。 该范围清晰地映射到 OWASP Agentic Top 10 (2026) 的一部分：表现为行动的风险由特定的墙解决；模型推理中存在的风险显然超出了范围，并且在下面进行了标记，而不是掩盖。 每个“已寻址”行都指向一面墙，该墙是在“它阻止的内容”基准中测量的，但未断言。

OWASP 代理风险 量子层 How
工具误用/意外的代码执行 已解决 内容寻址 execve (exec wall) 仅允许学习允许列表中的二进制文件；掉落的有效负载或注射拉动工具无法启动。
MCP 工具调用滥用（合同外/未经授权的状态更改） 已解决 MCP 检查网关（ql mcp 网关）根据服务器公布的模式验证每个工具/调用，并阻止被门控为状态更改的工具，除非列入允许列表；被拒绝的呼叫永远不会到达服务器，并且每个决定都是可审核的。
权限妥协/升级 已解决 删除功能 + seccomp 拒绝列表 + 用户命名空间映射；代理仅拥有其个人资料授予的权利。
资源/可用性滥用 已解决 cgroups 上限（pid/内存/cpu）包含 fork 炸弹和耗尽。
身份滥用（非人类身份） 部分的 Ed25519 具有衰减委托（ql-token）的代理身份：权限只会缩小代理树的范围，与内核绑定到单元。 Vault 颁发的临时凭证已在路线图上，但尚未交付。
意外的 RCE/特权数据访问 已解决 mount wall 使工作空间外的秘密（~/.ssh、云信用）不可见；网络墙阻挡了云元数据 SSRF 路径。
级联故障/流氓代理操作 部分的 Kill switch（qlkill）立即撤销一个代理及其整个进程树；每个子任务的遏制范围限制了爆炸半径。 不能防止个人资料内的操作出错。
记忆中毒 超出范围 模型背景/推理风险； QuantmLayer 管理操作，而不是模型内存。
目标劫持/意图操纵 超出范围 提示层风险。 QuantmLayer 在这里的价值在于下游：即使是完全被劫持的代理也只能采取其配置文件允许的操作，但检测劫持本身并不是该层的作用。

特别是在提示注入方面：QuantmLayer 不会检测或阻止提示注入——这是一个模型层问题。 它的作用是使注入变得不那么重要：被破坏的代理仍然无法读取挂载墙隐藏的秘密，到达代理拒绝的域，或运行执行墙不承认的二进制文件。 无论特工为何尝试，收容都会有效。

欧盟人工智能法案（第 12 条记录）。 该法案的高风险系统日志记录义务将于 2026 年 8 月生效。 QuantmLayer 的审计层是记录保存的技术基础：每个受管理的操作（exec.run/exec.deny、出口决策、策略更改）都写入散列链式、防篡改日志，每条记录都标有 ai_system 身份（system_id、model_version），并且可由不依赖 QuantmLayer 的第三方独立验证（ql 审计导出提供仅 stdlib 验证器）。 这是一种强有力的技术控制，可产生第 12 条所涉及的证据——不是交钥匙产品或经过认证的合规产品；合规性的法律决定是部署者与律师共同做出的。 完整的逐个控制细节保存在单独的映射文档中。

代理身份，强制执行

QuantmLayer 中代理的身份是 Ed25519 密钥对 — 公钥是身份，每个操作或委托都是生成的私钥持有者的签名。 最重要的是削弱委托令牌：当规划者代理生成编码器时，编码器生成审阅者，每个人都会传递一个令牌，该令牌只能缩小权限，而永远不会扩大权限。 这种单调窄化属性是强制的，而不是传统的——尝试授予其父代未持有的权利的委托代币会被拒绝（衰减违规）。

令牌绑定到遏制单元：在构建单元之前，可以通过启动配置文件的令牌来缩小配置文件的范围，因此凭证和执行是相同的决定。 这是具有零常设特权的非人类身份——代理完全拥有其令牌所承载的其运行的子任务的权利，在内核边界进行检查，而不是按照约定进行信任。 ql 令牌演示走完整的问题 → 衰减 → 拒绝扩大路径。

范围说明：这是身份和委托基础。 与企业秘密保管库（Vault、AWS Secrets Manager、Cyber​​Ark）集成以颁发临时、自动撤销的凭证已在路线图上，但尚未发布。

建筑学

该系统是一个由集中板条箱组成的小型 Cargo 工作区：

  • ql-profile — 可移植、独立于操作系统的策略模型（纯数据；无操作系统依赖性）。 配置文件声明文件系统、网络、系统调用、功能和资源规则。
  • ql-learn——学习的一半，以及护城河。 它通过 ptrace 跟踪代理的真实系统调用（具有读/写意图的 openat/open、execve、connect），然后根据代理实际需要的内容合成最低权限配置文件。 强制执行是机械性的；决定执行什么是可辩护的部分。 这是 Decap 静态能力推导的动态对应。
  • ql-enforce — Linux 强制引擎。 每个遏制机制都是一个 Enforcer（挂载、命名空间、cgroup、seccomp、网络，以及 lsm 功能背后的内容寻址 execve），组成一个用于分叉、应用隔离墙并执行代理的 Cell。 失败关闭：如果无法应用墙，则代理不会运行。
  • ql-lsm — 内容寻址的 exec wall：一个可休眠的 BPF-LSM 程序，它在 execve 上对每个二进制文件进行哈希处理（通过内核的 IMA），并仅允许配置文件允许列表上的摘要，因此代理从未运行的二进制文件会被内容拒绝，而不是名称拒绝。 除了允许/拒绝之外，它还强制执行每个二进制文件的 argv 拒绝规则：对于批准的二进制文件，特定的拒绝参数（例如破坏性标志）与提交的 argv 相匹配，并且有问题的进程被内核杀死（bpf_send_signal）。 这是一个提交后检测和终止，故意与执行前摘要允许/拒绝不同——只有在安装新映像后，声音、防篡改的 argv 才可读，因此墙会在此时终止调用，而不是声称事先阻止它。 在 ql-enforce 的 lsm 功能后面构建，并从默认工作区中排除，因为它需要 BPF/clang 工具链来编译 - 所有其他 crate 都无需特殊工具即可构建。
  • ql-broker — 一个出口代理（HTTP CONNECT 代理），它强制执行配置文件的域白名单并拒绝私有/链接本地地址。 可选的令牌门控：使用 --trust，出口需要一个有效的签名委托令牌 (ql-token)，其能力允许目的地，并且每个决策都写入防篡改审计日志 (ql-audit)。 纯用户空间，不是 Linux 特定的。
  • ql-bench — 基准测试工具（“可信度引擎”），针对每个后端运行攻击目录并发出上面的记分卡。
  • ql-cli — 上述所有内容的 ql 命令行前门。

这种划分是经过深思熟虑的：ql-profile 是可移植的合约，ql-enforce 是所有特定于操作系统的代码所在的位置，而 ql-broker 是可移植的操作系统。 未来的 macOS（安全带）或 Windows（AppContainer/作业对象）后端将针对相同的配置文件实施相同的 Enforcer 合约。

平台支持

内核包含层以 Linux 为目标，适用于当前的每个企业内核（RHEL 8/9、所有当前的 Ubuntu LTS、Amazon Linux）——命名空间、挂载隔离、经典 seccomp-bpf 和 cgroup（支持 v1 和 v2）。 如果宿主缺乏特定的控制，该壁就会退化为明确报告的“不受支持”，而不是使整个细胞失效。 内容寻址的 exec wall 具有更严格的要求：它需要一个使用 BPF-LSM 和 IMA 构建的内核（Linux ≥ 5.7，且 bpf 在活动 LSM 列表中），并且仅在 lsm-feature 版本中进行编译；如果其中任何一个缺失，执行执行会像任何其他墙一样报告“不受支持”，而单元格的其余部分则保持不变。 代理是纯用户空间，可以在任何地方运行。 Brokered egress (ql run --broker) 另外使用 iproute2（无处不在的 ip 工具）来连接 veth 上行链路。

在托管云节点映像上进行了验证。 严格要求问题——“我的云节点真的有 BPF-LSM + IMA 吗？” ——通过测量而不是假设来回答。 在 Amazon Linux 2023（默认 Amazon EKS 节点操作系统）（内核 6.18）上，真正的 ql 运行会强制执行第 1 层 BPF-LSM exec wall，无需重新配置节点：bpf 已位于活动 LSM 列表中，并且内容寻址默认拒绝与库存 IMA 设置配合使用 — 无需自定义 AMI，也无需 IMA 策略（已验证：已批准的二进制文件运行，未经批准的二进制文件在执行时被拒绝）。 Google Container-Optimized OS 是默认的 GKE 节点操作系统（内核 6.6），以相同的方式提供 BPF-LSM，并且具有 Tier-1 功能。 在任何节点上运行 ql doctor 以查看其解析的层，或运行 script/ql-kernel-probe.sh 以获取完整的只读内核功能报告。

支持 x86-64 和 aarch64 (ARM64)，包括配置文件学习：系统调用号按架构解析，跟踪器通过架构的本机 ptrace 接口读取寄存器，因此 ql learn 适用于 Apple Silicon VM 和 AWS Graviton 以及 x86-64 主机。

部署和姿势

该单元是在非特权用户命名空间的基础上构建自身的，因此它需要能够使用用户命名空间。 在强化内核（运行 6.8+ HWE 内核的 Ubuntu 24.04 和 22.04）上，AppArmor 默认情况下会限制这一点：程序可以创建用户命名空间，但无法使用其中的功能。 当这种情况发生时，ql run 会做正确的事情，拒绝在不受控制的情况下运行代理，准确报告哪堵墙发生了故障，而不是默默地在笼子上开个洞运行。

支持的姿势有以下三种：

  1. Rootless + AppArmor 配置文件（推荐）。 安装二进制文件和捆绑的配置文件（sudo make install && sudo make install-apparmor）。 然后，ql 被授予 userns，而主机上的所有其他程序都保持受保护 — 系统范围内没有任何内容被削弱。 这与 Ubuntu 为 Chrome 和 Flatpak 提供的机制相同。 需要 AppArmor 4.x 用户空间。
  2. 无根+解除限制（快速，对于开发人员）。 回声 0 | sudo tee /proc/sys/kernel/apparmor_restrict_unprivileged_userns。 速度快，但它放松了对主机上每个程序的保护，因此它不适合共享或生产计算机。
  3. 根。 在 sudo 下运行 ql run 无条件地具有所需的功能，并且另外启用 cgroup 资源限制（见下文）。 最简单的演示；启动器本身以 root 身份运行。

每个姿势中哪些墙处于活动状态：

Wall 无根（+轮廓或提升） Root
文件系统隐藏（挂载） ✅ ✅
系统调用拒绝 (seccomp) ✅ ✅
网络默认拒绝/出口代理 ✅ ✅
资源限制（cgroup：pid/内存） ⚠️ 仅适用于 cgroup 委托 ✅
内容寻址执行程序 (BPF-LSM) ❌需要 root + lsm 构建 ✅ 使用 BPF-LSM/IMA 内核

cgroup wall 是无根奇偶校验的一个例外：编写 cgroup 限制需要 root 或委托的 cgroup 子树（例如，具有 Delegate=yes 的 systemd 用户切片）。 如果没有它，该墙就会降级为清晰打印的“不可用”警告，并且单元会继续 - 因此在库存无根主机上，文件/系统调用/网络遏制完全有效，但分叉炸弹/内存限制则不然。 当资源限制很重要时，在 root 下运行（或设置委派）。 exec wall 的门控类似：加载其 BPF-LSM 程序需要 root 和 BPF-LSM/IMA 内核，并且它仅在 lsm-feature 构建中进行编译 - 因此它在默认的无 root 状态下处于非活动状态，而当您以 root 身份运行 --features lsm 构建时处于活动状态。

发展

make check       # fmt + clippy + tests (the CI gate)
make test        # workspace tests
make test-priv   # includes the privileged namespace integration tests
make benchmark   # run the attack benchmark and render the scorecard

每个源文件都以命名其路径的注释开头，并且执行路径不包含恐慌 - 无法应用的墙会返回结构化错误，并且单元无法关闭。

机器接口（CI/脚本）

每个 CI 相关命令都使用 JSON，并具有记录的退出代码契约 - ql run --result-json、ql learn --json、ql validate --json、qlaudit verify --json、ql doctor --json。 退出代码 3 是“策略发现”代码（--strict will-deny，审计篡改），与 1（无法运行）和 2（使用）不同，因此管道可以在不抓取 stderr 的情况下进行门控。 完整合约：docs/MACHINE-INTERFACE.md。
